prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing the S63B44T4 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) with a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (88mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe system from Fabspeed Motorsport, featuring 304 stainless steel construction and 200-cell catalytic converters for emissions compliance while maintaining a 35% flow increase over OEM.

Precision Raceworks Stage 3 port injection kit with dual 2,200cc Injector Dynamics ID2600X injectors and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank, supporting up to 1,200 horsepower on E85, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for full flex-fuel mapping and individual cylinder trimming to address the S63's inherent cylinder bank imbalances.

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression), 25mm front and 20mm rear ride height adjustment, and spherical top mounts for the X5 M's specific front strut tower geometry, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars to reduce body roll by 40% during high-G cornering.
estetica: Vorsteiner V-RT Aero Package for the X5 M Competition, including a carbon fiber front splitter with integrated air curtains, side skirts with vortex generators, and a rear diffuser with dual 4-inch titanium exhaust outlets from Akrapović, all finished in a custom matte BMW Individual Frozen Deep Green with gold pinstriping.

AGM Automotive RS6-style carbon fiber side vents (functional, with internal ducting to the rear brakes) and a custom carbon fiber roof panel from 3D Carbon, reducing weight by 12kg while maintaining structural rigidity, paired with a set of HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (22x10.5 ET35 front, 22x12.5 ET45 rear) in a matte bronze finish with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 front, 325/25 rear).

Full interior overhaul by Status Gruppe, featuring a full Alcantara headliner, carbon fiber M Performance steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display, Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, and a custom rear roll cage from VAC Motorsports with integrated fire suppression system and a bespoke Alcantara-wrapped center console housing a Motec PDM30 power distribution module.
